name: wooden_chair
prompt: A single isolated wooden chair, straight backrest, flat seat, sturdy square legs, clean joinery, realistic proportions, made of solid oak or walnut wood with visible grain and a subtle varnished sheen, in medium-dark natural brown wood, minimal Scandinavian dining chair. Designed to remain believable in an overcast autumn roadside scene with damp asphalt, muted earthy colors, and soft diffuse outdoor light, with realistic material response that will still look plausible when later inserted into a moody outdoor road scene. Use a restrained, photorealistic look with muted brown, walnut, oak, asphalt gray, autumn foliage tones; avoid showroom gloss, plastic toy look, oversaturated colors, and bright studio-commercial styling. Centered object only, pure white background, soft diffuse lighting, photorealistic, 8K

features.material: solid oak or walnut wood with visible grain and a subtle varnished sheen
